content.text:
It's -- fine? I mean, it's a lot of work but that's just how it is. I knew it would be intense when I took the role. I should be able to handle this, honestly, other people do it all the time. It's just the timing is bad with everything else stacking up.

...I mean it's a little nerve-wracking, I guess. But that's normal. Everyone gets nervous before presentations. Can we talk about how to structure the prep time? Because I'm thinking if I do the stakeholder deck tonight and then the main presentation tomorrow I might be able to --
